content: Just as the language teaching definition of reflexion frames it as both physical reflection of light and deliberate learning-oriented self-examination in language learning, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to leverage the dual meaning of reflexion: LLMs should not only examine their own outputs, but also "reflect" outputs like a mirror to bounce inconsistent reasoning perspectives back from their original wrong responses, aligning with how reflection as a physical metaphor. This dual-property reflexion framework can improve LLM problem-solving. The type is principle.
